moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th edition of The Championships, Wimbledon, begins on Monday, June 29th, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Game, set, match! Wimbledon 2026 starts tomorrow, get ready for two weeks of grass-court action, strawberries, and cream. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: London is buzzing! The All England Club opens its gates tomorrow for Wimbledon 2026. Are you heading to SW19 or watching from the Hill?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 takes place at the iconic Silverstone Circuit from July 3rd to 5th.

angles.name: Race Weekend Kick-off
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The F1 British Grand Prix kicks off this Friday at Silverstone. Who's taking pole position for the weekend?

angles.name: Silverstone Excitement
angles.copy: Silverstone is calling! The British Grand Prix is just days away. Will we see a home hero on the podium this year?

moments.title: England Men vs India T20I
moments.blurb: England Men's white-ball team faces India in the first Vitality IT20 at the Riverside Ground in Chester-le-Street on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Big cricket coming! England Men take on India in the first T20 International this Wednesday. Expect fireworks at the Riverside!

angles.name: North East Focus
angles.copy: The North East welcomes England Cricket! Durham's Riverside Ground hosts the first T20I against India this Wednesday. Who's got tickets?

moments.title: Bad Bunny Live in London
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winner Bad Bunny brings his 'DeBÍ TiRAR MáS FOToS World Tour' to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London for a second night tonight, June 28th.

angles.name: Tonight's Gig
angles.copy: Bad Bunny takes over Tottenham Hotspur Stadium tonight for his second London show! Who's ready for a night of Latin trap and pure energy?

angles.name: London Gig Buzz
angles.copy: Another huge night in London! Bad Bunny is live at Spurs' stadium tonight. Did you catch him or are you heading there?

moments.title: Katy Perry at Blenheim Palace
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Katy Perry is set to headline the Blenheim Palace Festival on Wednesday, July 1st, promising a spectacular show at the historic Oxfordshire venue.

angles.name: Pop Royalty
angles.copy: Roar! Katy Perry brings her pop majesty to Blenheim Palace this Wednesday! Who's excited to witness a truly iconic performance?

angles.name: Festival Highlight
angles.copy: The Blenheim Palace Festival continues with Katy Perry headlining on July 1st. Get ready for a night of chart-topping hits!

moments.title: Michael Bublé at Blenheim Palace
moments.blurb: The incomparable Michael Bublé will charm audiences at the Blenheim Palace Festival on Saturday, July 4th, performing his beloved hits in a stunning setting.

angles.name: Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready for an evening of smooth vocals! Michael Bublé performs at Blenheim Palace this Saturday. Perfect summer vibes guaranteed.

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Planning your weekend? Michael Bublé at Blenheim Palace on July 4th promises an unforgettable night of music and romance.

moments.title: Metallica Takes London Stadium
moments.blurb: Metal legends Metallica bring their 'M72 World Tour' to London Stadium for two 'No Repeat Weekend' shows, starting Friday, July 3rd.

angles.name: Metal Mayhem
angles.copy: Metallica are back! London Stadium gets two nights of pure metal from Friday as the M72 World Tour rolls in. Get ready to headbang!

angles.name: No Repeat Weekend
angles.copy: Two nights, two completely different sets! Metallica's 'No Repeat Weekend' hits London Stadium starting July 3rd. Which night are you going?

moments.title: Duran Duran at BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: New Romantic icons Duran Duran headline BST Hyde Park on Sunday, July 5th, with the reunited Scissor Sisters as main support.

angles.name: 80s Legends
angles.copy: Hungry Like the Wolf? Duran Duran are headlining BST Hyde Park this Sunday! Get ready for a dose of 80s cool in London.

angles.name: London Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Hyde Park is buzzing! Duran Duran and Scissor Sisters are set to light up the stage this Sunday at BST. Who's got their tickets?

moments.title: Legally Blonde Prequel 'Elle' Airs
moments.blurb: The much-anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', exploring Elle Woods' teenage years, premieres on Prime Video on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: New TV Show
angles.copy: What, like it's hard? The 'Legally Blonde' prequel series 'Elle' drops on Prime Video this Wednesday! Get ready for more bend and snap!

angles.name: Streaming Alert
angles.copy: Your new binge-watch awaits! The 'Elle' series, a prequel to 'Legally Blonde', is coming to Prime Video on July 1st. Who's tuning in?

moments.title: Happy 78th to Ian Paice
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only constant member of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday tomorrow, June 29th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate Ian Paice of Deep Purple turning 78! Still drumming strong. What's your favourite Deep Purple track?

moments.title: Happy 48th to Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Former Pussycat Dolls lead singer and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 tomorrow, June 29th.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish her a happy birthday? Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 tomorrow! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

moments.title: Happy 66th to Evelyn 'Champagne' King
moments.blurb: Disco and R&B legend Evelyn 'Champagne' King, known for hits like 'Shame', celebrates her 66th birthday tomorrow, June 29th.

angles.name: Disco Diva Birthday
angles.copy: Shame, shame, shame if you forget! Happy 66th birthday tomorrow to the iconic Evelyn 'Champagne' King! What's your go-to track?

moments.title: Happy 81st to Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Deborah Harry, the iconic lead singer of Blondie, will celebrate her 81st birthday on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: Punk Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Call Me! The legendary Debbie Harry of Blondie turns 81 this Wednesday. A true punk and new wave icon!

moments.title: Happy 55th to Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott will celebrate her 55th birthday on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Royalty Birthday
angles.copy: Work It! The one and only Missy Elliott turns 55 this Wednesday. A true innovator in music!

moments.title: Happy 66th to Vince Clarke
moments.blurb: Vince Clarke, the influential synth-pop pioneer from Erasure, Depeche Mode, and Yazoo, celebrates his 66th birthday on Friday, July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Genius Birthday
angles.copy: Just Can't Get Enough! Happy 66th birthday this Friday to synth-pop legend Vince Clarke (Depeche Mode, Yazoo, Erasure)!

moments.title: Happy 76th to Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for hits like 'The Power of Love', will celebrate his 76th birthday on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Icon Birthday
angles.copy: It's the Heart of Rock & Roll! Happy 76th birthday this Sunday to the fantastic Huey Lewis! What's your favourite tune from The News?
